query:
INSERT INTO secure_documents (title, description, documentType, content, status, accessLevel, ownerId, version, blockchainHash)
VALUES (
  'Grant Application Template - Community Education Program',
  'Template for applying to education and community development grants',
  'grant_application',
  '# Grant Application Template
## 508-LuvOnPurpose Academy and Outreach

---

## SECTION 1: ORGANIZATION INFORMATION

**Organization Name:** 508-LuvOnPurpose Academy and Outreach

**Tax Status:** 508(c)(1)(a) Faith-Based Organization

**Address:** [Insert Address]

**Contact Person:** LaShanna Russell

**Email:** therealeyenation@gmail.com

**Phone:** [Insert Phone]

**Website:** [Insert Website]

---

## SECTION 2: EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

[Customize for each grant - 250 words max]

508-LuvOnPurpose Academy and Outreach seeks funding to expand our community education programs that provide free financial literacy training, Divine STEM education, and L.A.W.S. Framework courses to underserved families. Our programs have demonstrated success in improving financial knowledge and empowering participants to build generational wealth.

---

## SECTION 3: STATEMENT OF NEED

[Customize based on grant focus - include local statistics]

Our community faces significant challenges:
- Financial literacy rates below national average
- Limited access to quality STEM education
- Generational poverty cycles
- Lack of culturally relevant educational resources

---

## SECTION 4: PROJECT DESCRIPTION

**Program Name:** [Insert Program Name]

**Target Population:** [Describe who will be served]

**Geographic Area:** [Describe service area]

**Program Goals:**
1. [Goal 1]
2. [Goal 2]
3. [Goal 3]

**Activities:**
- [Activity 1]
- [Activity 2]
- [Activity 3]

**Timeline:**
- Month 1-3: [Phase 1]
- Month 4-6: [Phase 2]
- Month 7-12: [Phase 3]

---

## SECTION 5: OUTCOMES AND EVALUATION

**Expected Outcomes:**
- Number of participants served: [X]
- Completion rate target: [X]%
- Knowledge improvement: [X]%

**Evaluation Methods:**
- Pre/post assessments
- Participant surveys
- Follow-up tracking

---

## SECTION 6: BUDGET

| Category | Amount |
|----------|--------|
| Personnel | $[X] |
| Materials | $[X] |
| Technology | $[X] |
| Facilities | $[X] |
| Marketing | $[X] |
| Administration | $[X] |
| **TOTAL** | **$[X]** |

**Amount Requested:** $[X]

**Other Funding Sources:** [List other funders]

---

## SECTION 7: ORGANIZATIONAL CAPACITY

**Years in Operation:** [X]

**Annual Budget:** $[X]

**Staff:** [X] full-time, [X] part-time, [X] volunteers

**Previous Grants:** [List relevant grants received]

**Key Accomplishments:**
- [Accomplishment 1]
- [Accomplishment 2]
- [Accomplishment 3]

---

## SECTION 8: ATTACHMENTS CHECKLIST

[ ] Board of Directors list
[ ] Current year budget
[ ] Financial statements
[ ] 508(c)(1)(a) documentation
[ ] Letters of support
[ ] Program materials samples

---

## NOTES FOR CUSTOMIZATION

1. Research each funder requirements
2. Align language with funder priorities
3. Include specific local data
4. Attach required documentation
5. Follow word/page limits exactly',
  'final',
  'owner_only',
  1,
  1,
  SHA2(CONCAT('grant_template_', NOW()), 256)
);

3. Include specific local data

  'final',

  1,

  SHA2(CONCAT('grant_template_', NOW()), 256)
);
